Bitmap data for an error URL image with dimensions 109x14 pixels.

# Purpose
The code defines a bitmap image used for error handling in a software application. The `error_url_width` and `error_url_height` macros specify the dimensions of the bitmap, which are 109 pixels wide and 14 pixels high. The `error_url_bits` array contains the bitmap data as a series of unsigned char values, representing the pixel pattern of the image. This bitmap can be used to visually indicate an error state or message within the user interface of the application. The data is stored in a static array, ensuring it is available throughout the program's execution.
